projects.title: EMIT Singing Contest
projects.subtitle: Voting Platform for EMIT's Official Anthem
projects.description: A fullstack web platform for managing a student singing contest aimed at electing the 'Hira faneva ny sekoly' — the official anthem of EMIT university.
projects.detailedDescription: Development of a fullstack application for the complete management of a university singing contest. The Node.js/Express backend exposes a JWT-secured REST API with role-based access control (superAdmin, Admin), audio and PDF file uploads, a scoring system, and automatic average calculation. The Next.js frontend provides a modern interface for both administrators and participants, with Docker support for deployment.
projects.functionality: Administrators can log in, rate participants (0 to 20), view average score reports, and manage admin accounts based on their role. Participants submit their files (voice, instrumental, final mix, lyrics) before the deadline. A Socket.IO system enables real-time updates. Access is secured via JWT with role-checking and deadline-enforcement middleware.
features: JWT authentication with role-based access control (superAdmin / Admin)
Audio (.mp3) and PDF file uploads per participant
Scoring system from 0 to 20 with automatic average calculation
Admin dashboard with activity tracking (lastSeen)
Deadline control for closing participant submissions
Real-time communication via Socket.IO
Responsive Next.js interface with Docker deployment

projects.title: SmartCTRL
projects.subtitle: Turn Your Smartphone into a Universal PC & Smart TV Remote
projects.description: A web-based universal remote control that transforms any smartphone into a trackpad, keyboard, and controller for PCs and Smart TVs — running entirely over local network with no internet required.
projects.detailedDescription: Smart Remote Web is a local-network application that turns a smartphone browser into a full remote control for a PC or Smart TV. The Node.js/Express server communicates with the smartphone client via WebSocket, forwarding gesture and keyboard inputs to a Python daemon (pynput) that executes real OS-level mouse and keyboard actions. The connection is secured by a unique token shared via QR code. The client is a PWA installable on any smartphone, featuring a tactile trackpad, virtual keyboard, and gesture recognition — all built with vanilla JavaScript.
projects.functionality: The user starts the server on their PC, scans the generated QR code with their smartphone, and instantly gains full control over their machine. Finger gestures on the touchpad move the mouse, tap and double-tap trigger clicks, and the virtual keyboard allows remote text input. The system runs 100% locally over WiFi with no data sent to the internet. Wake Lock prevents the smartphone from sleeping during use.
features: Tactile trackpad with tap, double-tap, and swipe gesture support
Virtual keyboard for remote text input
Secure QR code connection with unique token per session
Real-time communication via WebSocket
Python daemon (pynput) for OS-level mouse and keyboard control
PWA — installable directly on smartphone
Wake Lock to prevent smartphone screen from sleeping
100% local network — no internet connection required
Minimal and responsive UI built with JS and HTML5/CSS3

projects.title: SYMPTOMA
projects.subtitle: Medical Disease Prediction using Deep Learning
projects.description: AI-powered application that predicts a probable disease based on the user's age, sex, and symptoms — using a deep learning model trained on simulated medical data.
projects.detailedDescription: SYMPTOMA is a fullstack AI application combining a Keras multi-class classification model with a Flask REST API and a React frontend. The user inputs their age, sex, and symptoms in plain text, and the model returns the most probable disease. A Text-to-Speech feature using the Web Speech API reads the result aloud, improving accessibility. The project includes a complete data processing pipeline built with scikit-learn, pandas, and joblib.
projects.functionality: The user submits their symptoms, age, and sex through the React interface. The data is sent to the Flask API, processed through the trained deep learning model, and a disease prediction is returned and displayed. The Web Speech API then automatically reads the predicted disease aloud. The model was trained on simulated medical data and supports multi-class disease classification.
features: Disease prediction from age, sex, and free-text symptoms
Multi-class classification model built with TensorFlow / Keras
Automatic Text-to-Speech readout via Web Speech API (SpeechSynthesis)
Lightweight and fast REST API with Flask & Flask-CORS
Complete data processing pipeline with scikit-learn, pandas, and joblib
React frontend with an intuitive and accessible interface
Open-source project for educational and research purposes

projects.title: E-Store
projects.subtitle: Full Admin System for a Computer & Tech Shop
projects.description: Complete admin system for a computer and tech store selling PCs, phones, printers and accessories — with role-based access control, order management, delivery tracking and real-time notifications.
projects.detailedDescription: Development of a fullstack admin system for a computer and tech store. The platform acts as a complete back-office for an e-commerce operation, without a public customer-facing interface. The superAdmin assigns specific roles to each user, controlling which interfaces and features they can access. The backend is built with Node.js and Express, using optimized PostgreSQL queries for performance. Socket.IO enables real-time notifications across the platform.
projects.functionality: The superAdmin manages all user accounts and assigns roles that restrict or grant access to specific modules. Depending on their role, users can manage the product catalog (PCs, phones, printers, accessories), handle customer orders, track deliveries, and receive real-time alerts on key events. Each user only sees the interface relevant to their assigned role.
features: Role-based access control managed by the superAdmin
Dynamic interface rendering based on assigned user role
Full product catalog management (PCs, phones, printers, accessories)
Order management system with status tracking
Delivery tracking and status updates
Real-time notifications via Socket.IO
Optimized PostgreSQL queries for fast data retrieval
Clean and responsive admin dashboard built with React

projects.title: Indesik AI
projects.subtitle: Intelligent Project Structure & Code Generator via CLI
projects.description: A CLI-based AI tool that generates project structures and boilerplate code for Express, Django, Flask, React, Vue, Next.js and more — using CamemBERT NLP to understand natural language requests like 'I want to create an authentication service'.
projects.detailedDescription: Indesik AI is an intelligent code generation tool powered by CamemBERT NLP. It automatically detects the framework of the target project, extracts developer intent from plain natural language input (e.g. create_service, create_controller), and generates the appropriate file names, functions, classes, and variables using customizable Jinja2 templates per framework and intent. The tool is operated entirely through a Typer-based CLI and can run in simple one-command mode or interactive mode.
projects.functionality: The user runs a CLI command with a natural language description of what they want to build. Indesik AI detects the project framework, runs CamemBERT NLP to extract one or multiple intents, generates file names and boilerplate code using the matching Jinja2 template, and automatically creates the suggested files in the target project directory. An interactive mode is also available for a guided step-by-step experience.
features: Automatic framework detection (Express, Django, Flask, React, Vue, Next.js...)
CamemBERT NLP model for natural language intent extraction
Multi-intent detection from a single request
Intelligent generation of file names, functions, classes, and variables
Customizable Jinja2 templates per framework and intent
CLI interface built with Typer (simple and interactive modes)
Automatic file creation in the target project directory
Open-source and MIT licensed

projects.title: NOTEX AI
projects.subtitle: Automatic Note Classification API using NLP
projects.description: A Django REST API that automatically classifies notes and text phrases into predefined categories using a locally trained scikit-learn NLP model — with multi-label intent detection and Swagger documentation.
projects.detailedDescription: NOTEX AI is a backend API built with Django and Django REST Framework that brings automatic text classification to a note-taking system. Users submit one or multiple phrases, which are split and analyzed by a multi-label NLP classification model trained with scikit-learn and serialized with joblib. Each phrase is matched to one or more intent categories (e.g. Education, Shopping, Cooking). Classified notes are saved to the database, and the full API is documented interactively via Swagger UI and Redoc. Environment variables manage the database configuration securely through a .env file.
projects.functionality: The API receives a list of phrases, splits compound sentences into individual intents, classifies each one using the trained model, and returns a structured JSON response with detected categories per phrase. The ML model is trained locally via a Django management shell command, generating a model.joblib file. The system supports retraining after modifying categories or training data.
features: Multi-label intent classification for submitted text phrases
Automatic sentence splitting before classification
NLP model trained with scikit-learn and serialized with joblib
RESTful API built with Django REST Framework
Classified notes saved to the database
Interactive API documentation via Swagger UI and Redoc
Secure database configuration via .env file
Easy model retraining via Django management shell

projects.title: Centre ValBio – Internal Web System
projects.subtitle: Internal Visitor Guidance & Institutional Information Platform
projects.description: Design and implementation of an internal web platform to guide visitors and provide institutional information efficiently.
projects.detailedDescription: Development of an internal web system for Centre ValBio, a research and conservation center in Madagascar. The platform was built with a classic PHP/MySQL stack and serves as a centralized hub for visitor guidance and institutional information, accessible directly within the organization's internal network.
projects.functionality: The platform provides visitors and staff with easy access to institutional information, directions, and resources through a structured and user-friendly web interface. Built with PHP and MySQL for dynamic content management, and styled with HTML/CSS and JavaScript for an interactive experience.
features: Visitor guidance and orientation interface
Institutional information display
Dynamic content management with PHP and MySQL
Interactive UI with JavaScript
Internal network deployment
